title: Tissue Clearing Protocol for Uterus Tissues
author: Eunkyung Park
materials: Gradually dehydrate with MeOH/H2O (v/v) under the hood.
Refresh the 100% MeOH solution and then overnight.

steps.title: Uterus tissues were fixed with 4%...
steps.instruction: Uterus tissues were fixed with 4% PFA overnight at 4°C and washed with PBS.

steps.title: Cut the tissue into approximately 5mm...
steps.instruction: Cut the tissue into approximately 5mm x 5mm x 5mm pieces and incubate in 1.8ml of CHAPS/NMDEA solution at 37°C for 2 days. CHAPS/NMDEA is composed of 10% (wt/v) CHAPS and 25% (wt/v) NMDEA in diH2O. CHAPS (Sigma, #220201), NMDEA (Sigma, #471828).

steps.title: Wash with 1X PBS at room...
steps.instruction: Wash with 1X PBS at room temperature with rotation for 2 hours X3, then overnight.

steps.title: Incubate as described below at room temperature under the hood
steps.instruction: Incubate as described below at room temperature under the hood.

steps.title: Dehydrate with 10ml of 50% EtOH/H2O solution for 1 day
steps.instruction: Dehydrate with 10ml of 50% EtOH/H2O solution for 1 day.

steps.title: Dehydrate with 10ml of 70% EtOH/H2O solution for 1 day
steps.instruction: Dehydrate with 10ml of 70% EtOH/H2O solution for 1 day.

steps.title: Dehydrate with 10ml of 100% EtOH solution for 1 day
steps.instruction: Dehydrate with 10ml of 100% EtOH solution for 1 day.

steps.title: Delipidate with 10ml of DCM/MeOH (2:1,...
steps.instruction: Delipidate with 10ml of DCM/MeOH (2:1, v/v) solution for 2 days.

steps.title: Rehydrate with 10ml of 100% EtOH solution for 1 day
steps.instruction: Rehydrate with 10ml of 100% EtOH solution for 1 day.

steps.title: Rehydrate with 10ml of 70% EtOH/H2O solution for 1 day
steps.instruction: Rehydrate with 10ml of 70% EtOH/H2O solution for 1 day.

steps.title: Rehydrate with 10ml of 50% EtOH/H2O solution for 1 day
steps.instruction: Rehydrate with 10ml of 50% EtOH/H2O solution for 1 day.

steps.title: Rehydrate with 10ml of diH2O solution for 1 day
steps.instruction: Rehydrate with 10ml of diH2O solution for 1 day.

steps.title: Remove the samples from diH2O and...
steps.instruction: Remove the samples from diH2O and place it in 10 ml of acetic acid solution for 1 day at room temperature under the hood.

steps.title: Wash twice with diH2O for 1...
steps.instruction: Wash twice with diH2O for 1 day at room temperature and incubate with 10 ml of guanidine solution for 1 day. Guanidine solution is composed of 4M guanidine hydrochloride, 0.05M sodium acetate and 2% (wt/vol) Triton X-100 in PBS, pH6.0. Guanidine hydrochloride (Sigma, #3272).

steps.title: Wash with 1X PBS at room...
steps.instruction: Wash with 1X PBS at room temperature with rotation for 2 hours X3, then overnight.

steps.title: Block with 10% (v/v) goat serum,...
steps.instruction: Block with 10% (v/v) goat serum, 10% (v/v) DMSO and 0.2% (v/v) Triton X-100 in 1X PBS at 4°C on rotator for 3 days.

steps.title: Incubate with conjugated Ab in the...
steps.instruction: Incubate with conjugated Ab in the Ab incubation buffer at 4°C on rotator 14 days. The antibody incubation buffer is composed of 3% (v/v) goat serum, 3% (v/v) DMSO and 0.2% (v/v) Tween-20 in 1X PBS. The conjugated Ab that we used is Alexa Fluor® 647 anti-Podoplanin (Lymphatic Endothelial Marker) Antibody, #916610.

steps.title: Wash with 0
steps.instruction: Wash with 0.1% Tween-20 in PBS at room temperature with rotation for 2 hours X3, then overnight.

steps.title: Embed the tissue in 1% agarose...
steps.instruction: Embed the tissue in 1% agarose gel/diH2O and cooling for 3 hours.

steps.title: Dehydrate with 10ml of 50% MeOH/H2O solution for 2 hours
steps.instruction: Dehydrate with 10ml of 50% MeOH/H2O solution for 2 hours.

steps.title: Dehydrate with 10ml of 70% MeOH/H2O solution for 2 hours
steps.instruction: Dehydrate with 10ml of 70% MeOH/H2O solution for 2 hours.

steps.title: Dehydrate with 10ml of 100% MeOH solution for 2 hours
steps.instruction: Dehydrate with 10ml of 100% MeOH solution for 2 hours.

steps.title: Change to BABB/MeOH (1:1) for 5...
steps.instruction: Change to BABB/MeOH (1:1) for 5 hours and perform RI matching with BABB solution for 1-4 days until the sample becomes completely transparent.

steps.title: Place the sample to the imaging chamber
steps.instruction: Place the sample to the imaging chamber. Glue or screw the sample to the chamber.

steps.title: Mount the chamber on the strip of a lightsheet microscope
steps.instruction: Mount the chamber on the strip of a lightsheet microscope.

steps.title: Move the light sheet up or...
steps.instruction: Move the light sheet up or down in xyz until the beam is in the center of the target.

steps.title: Determine channel and set the objective lens and zoom level
steps.instruction: Determine channel and set the objective lens and zoom level. Set the zero position and set scan range from start to end.

steps.title: Set the file to autosave and...
steps.instruction: Set the file to autosave and press the Start (play) button.

steps.title: Convert image to Imaris File
steps.instruction: Convert image to Imaris File. Double click the file, select the output location, name the file, and save as format of Imaris*.ims;*.ims. Press the Export data button.
